subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Your Microsoft 365 Account Will Be Suspended in 24 Hours
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our security systems have detected unusual sign-in activity on your Microsoft 365 account. To protect your data, your account will be permanently suspended within 24 hours unless you verify your identity immediately.

Detected suspicious activity:
- Sign-in from unrecognized device in Lagos, Nigeria (March 17, 2026)
- 3 failed password attempts from IP 197.210.xx.xx
- Attempted mailbox rule modification

To prevent account suspension and data loss, you must verify your identity now:

https://microsoftonline-verify.com/security/verify?user=dXNlckBleGFtcGxlLmNvbQ

If you do not complete verification within 24 hours:
- Your account will be permanently locked
- All emails, files, and OneDrive data will be deleted
- You will lose access to all Microsoft services

This is an automated security notification. Do not reply to this email.

Microsoft Account Protection Team
One Microsoft Way, Redmond, WA 98052
